title: Golden Waystones
description: A simple resource pack that changes Waystones from purple to gold
body:
![GoldenWaystones](https://i.imgur.com/dQyNchx.png)

Are you as obssed with gold as me? Well, then this ResourcePack is for you! I present Golden Waystones, a simple Resource Pack that changes the classic purple from [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) mod to Gold. This change should work on any version, but if you find any bug or have any suggestions, let me know!

![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/lv5kvvr.png) More images in the gallery tab!

### Installation

Use Modrinth App for a one click installation or follow the steps:

- Download the fille.
- Drop it inside your resourcepacks folder.
- Enable the Quark-less Glint inside your game.
- Enjoy!

### It's me, hi

All my social media can be found here: [Danymaddox](https://linktr.ee/Danymaddox).

And if you like to add more gold, follow me here on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Danymaddox) and take a look, there's more comming soon.

![BisectHostingBanner](https://i.imgur.com/a5blp93.png)
